title: Phunware Q2 2024 Earnings Report Summary
text: Phunware Q2 2024 Earnings Report Summary. Software Bookings Growth: 623% increase in Q2 software bookings compared to Q2 2023 and a remarkable 939% increase for the first half of 2024. Financial Performance: Revenue grew 10% to $1.0 million in Q2 2024 versus Q1 2024. Operating expenses declined 49% to $3.4 million. Net loss improved 60% to $2.6 million from $6.5 million year-over-year. Cash position strengthened to $20.4 million (up from $3.9 million at year-end 2023). Business Developments: The company secured early renewals with three major customers in hospitality and healthcare sectors and appointed Paul Ruffino as a strategic advisor for hospitality sector expansion. Additionally, Phunware was added to the FTSE Russell Microcap Index following the market close on June 28, 2024. Market Reaction: The stock experienced a positive 9.20% gain on the announcement day.
